About Me

More than code —
a problem-solver

Hi, I'm Samuel Adesina — a data-driven Data Scientist and Data Analyst with hands-on experience using Python, SQL, and BI tools to turn raw data into clear, actionable insights.

My work spans the full data science lifecycle — from exploratory data analysis and machine learning to NLP, Computer Vision, and MLOps pipelines. I build systems that don't just live in notebooks — they scale in production.

My background in technical support at PointePay sharpened my ability to investigate complex issues quickly, communicate clearly across teams, and maintain rigorous documentation.

🎓
